stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The image illustrates the same aeroplane flying at two different angles of attack (AoA), 2° and 12°. Assuming that the aircraft flies straight and level in both cases, what of the following statements is correct?

options.a: The aeroplane with an AoA of 12° has a lower MCRIT, and a larger buffet margin compared to the aeroplane with an AoA of 2°.
options.b: The aeroplane with an AoA of 12° has a higher MCRIT, and a smaller buffet margin compared to the aeroplane with an AoA of 2°.
options.c: The aeroplane with an AoA of 12° has a higher MCRIT, and a larger buffet margin compared to the aeroplane with an AoA of 2°.
options.d: The aeroplane with an AoA of 12° has a lower MCRIT, and a smaller buffet margin compared to the aeroplane with an AoA of 2°.
